about.bannerSubtitle: 香港隆祺科技有限公司
about.intro1: Founded in 2017, HK LONGKI TECHNOLOGY LIMITED is one of the world's leading electronic components distributors. We distribute product lines from ST, TI, ON, MICROCHIP, ADI, NXP and other renowned brands, with a professional sales team providing the highest quality service backed by rich experience and technical support.
about.intro2: HK LONGKI TECHNOLOGY LIMITED adheres to the business philosophy of 'Integrity first, never forget our初心, mutual benefit and win-win'. With a clear positioning and years of continuous effort, we maintain substantial stock of genuine products and can assist customers with both small and large batch overseas ordering. Our products are widely used in medical devices, automotive manufacturing, conference systems, downhole petroleum equipment, telecommunications, industrial control, and other fields.
about.cultureCommitmentDesc: 100% genuine! Honesty, integrity and mutual benefit
about.cultureGoalDesc: To become a top-tier global chip distributor
about.cultureValueDesc: Sincerity & Unity, Responsibility & Efficiency, Learning & Innovation, Gratitude & Win-Win
